_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: While only 36% of the control-transfected OLN93 cells showed no process, 66% of Merlin overexpressing cells had no projections...the length of the projections was significantly shorter in Merlin overexpressing OLN93 cells (129.13 ± 5.57 μm)
details: NF2 overexpression significantly reduced cellular projections (66% vs 36% with no processes) and shortened projection length (129.13±5.57 μm vs 159.53±6.43 μm)
